sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12660" key="a)po/qumos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπόθῡμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n12660.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀπρόθυμος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.87f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
